outputs.patch.diff:
--- a/table_14_4_01.R
+++ b/table_14_4_01.R
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # Table 14-4.01: Adverse Event Overview
 
 # Get population counts
-adsl_pop <- adsl %>% filter(SAFFL == "N")
+adsl_pop <- adsl %>% filter(SAFFL == "Y")
 
 n_trt <- adsl_pop %>%
   group_by(TRT01AN, TRT01A) %>%
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@
   ungroup()
 
 # Get TEAE counts
-adae_teae <- adae %>% filter(SAFFL == "Y")
+adae_teae <- adae %>% filter(SAFFL == "Y" & TRTEMFL == "Y")
 
 ae_summary <- adae_teae %>%
   group_by(TRT01AN, TRT01A) %>%
@@ -17,7 +17,7 @@
     subj_any_ae = n_distinct(USUBJID),
     subj_serious = n_distinct(USUBJID[AESER == "Y"]),
     subj_severe = n_distinct(USUBJID[ASEV == "SEVERE"]),
-    events_total = n()
+    events_total = n_distinct(USUBJID, AESEQ)
   ) %>%
   ungroup()
